items.headline: Bitcoin Climbs to Two-Week High After US-Iran Hormuz Deal
items.summary: (Bloomberg) -- Bitcoin climbed to its highest level in nearly two weeks after the US and Iran said they had reached an agreement to end hostilities and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.Most Read from BloombergIran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Confirms Deal Reached With USUS and Iran Agree to Halt War, Restart Middle East Oil ShipmentsIran Signals No Deal Will Be Signed by Trump’s Sunday TimelineWhy Musk Raced to Take SpaceX Public in the World’s Biggest IPOStocks Climb as US-Iran Deal Spurs Slide in Oil

items.headline: BlackRock (BLK) Stock After Recent Pullback Is The Current Price Still Reasonable
items.summary: If you are wondering whether BlackRock at around US$1,032 a share is offering good value right now, the key is to understand what the current price is actually implying about the company. The stock is up 3.7% over the past week, has fallen 5.7% over the past month, is down 4.9% year to date, and has returned 8.4% over the past year, 57.3% over three years and 38.5% over five years, which gives a mixed picture for anyone thinking about risk and return. Recent coverage of BlackRock has focused...
